---
title: "TrajectoryList.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\TrajectoryList.tsx"
loc: 26
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.42
style_score: 3.39
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 3.76
---

## Intent
The `TrajectoryList.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on TrajectoryList, TrajectoryList. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TrajectoryList, TrajectoryList. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `TrajectoryList`
- `TrajectoryList`
